reviews.review_title: Last update made VR videos look weird
reviews.review_description: Yesterday, the app got updated and since then the 180 VR SBS content looks weird. It is still 3D but compared to before, the angle of the field of view is somehow different and misplaced and the image feels less immersive. It seems to be a tick more fisheye like. I tried tinkering with all available display settings but could not change it. @Devs whatever you have done to this former awesome app: Please revert it. And always think of the golden rule to never change a running system.

developer_response.body: Hi, we are working on a fix for this display issue. To make sure we're heading in the right direction, could you confirm a quick detail? Did you adjust the "3D Offset" while watching the VR180 video? Also, did you notice a drop in immersion after making that adjustment? Thanks for your help!

reviews.review_title: A video works today, won't work tomorrow
reviews.review_description: This has been a consistent problem for a while now. A video can play perfectly fine one day and then the next day it will be choppy and laggy. It makes no sense to me. I've tried deleting my history, not deleting my history, restarting the app, restarting my quest, restarting my PC,  reinstalling the app, using a wired connection, copying the file, renaming the file, moving the file to a different drive, etc, etc. Its so frustrating.

developer_response.body:
Hello, we improved the network streaming performance in the latest beta version. You can update to the beta version 2.0.2 and give it a try. 

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, please go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the beta update.
 
Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have any problems.

reviews.review_title: Good if U like buffering no image movies
reviews.review_description: Just purchased (again) as I upgraded to a Quest 3 from a Oculus GO and I can't use my old version. It's a shame  because that version worked. Now I can't watch anything in VR without buffering every few seconds. I also can't watch some standard movie files with images, only sound.  Other free or trial players can play them all without problems using the exact system. Wish there was a trial where I could have tested it before purchasing, as I definitely would not have. I went by all the claims SKYBOX said, which were all rubbish. I'd give it zero stars if I could.

developer_response.body:
Hello, we improved the network streaming performance in the latest beta version. You can update to the beta version 2.0.2 and give it a try. 

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, please go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the beta update.
 
Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have any problems.

reviews.review_description:
This new version sucks!  The Pro HD garbage was turned on by default and it looked and sounded horrible.  All video was washed out and blown out at the same time.  The audio sounded strangely weird and  all audio on every video was out of sync.  Once I turned the Pro HD garbage off it all looked and sounded normal.  But their claims of faster thumbnail loading is an outright lie.  They now load even slower!  They also screwed up how the app exits videos and pics.  It now takes much longer to exit and get back to the menu.  So you're staring at black for almost two seconds.

Response to Dev, SMB share from a Windows 11 PC.  The v1.2.1 update didn't fix anything.  Thumbnails  (on newly browsed folders) are still super slow to load.  You again moved where Delete is.  Can you please make up your mind and leave it alone?  We delete so often it's muscle memory and you bouncing it around between middle of menu to bottom of menu is very annoying.  The new grouping wasn't needed at all.  All it did was clutter up the UI.  If you're going to mess with the UI that drastically then make it an OPTION that can be turned off/on.

developer_response.body:
Hello, if the new version isn't working well for you, would you be open to rolling back to the previous version 1.1.9? That should get things back to normal while we work on fixing the problems you mentioned. 

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "v1.1.9 Release" and install the update.

In addition, we just created our Discord server. You can join and directly chat with our devs. Here is the Discord link: https://discord.gg/TqwWDmCvrk

reviews.review_description:
Great Potential, But...

1. Lack of Independent Distance Adjustment (A Win for Moon VR)
One of the biggest letdowns in SKYBOX VR is that you cannot adjust the screen distance independently. Currently, screen size and distance are linked together—changing one automatically forces the other to change.
In contrast, Moon VR actually supports this feature flawlessly. In Void or MR mode, Moon VR allows you to position the screen exactly where you want it and at the precise size you need. You can even grab the screen and twist it to rotate or tilt it 360 degrees.
Because SKYBOX completely lacks this level of freedom, it leaves a lot to be desired. This is the main reason why I simply cannot give up on Moon VR just yet.

2. Impressive Cinema Details, But Unrealistic Seating Layout
While the visual details of the movie theater environments are absolutely stunning, the seating arrangement feels quite unrealistic.
The front-row seats are absurdly close to the screen—hardly 3 to 4 meters away. Given the size of the screen, there should be a minimum distance of at least 6 meters. A theater like this wouldn't exist in real life. It might seem like a minor detail, but making it more realistic would massively boost the immersion and make it feel like a real cinema.

3. Need bright backgrounds instead of just dark ones
Due to the nature of the Quest 3’s pancake lenses, dark backgrounds cause severe ghosting (glare). Please add a Void environment that supports custom colors like white or light blue.

4. No GIF Support
While it is great to be able to view photos via AirScreen, the app currently does not support GIFs (they just appear as static images). It would be a fantastic addition if GIF support could be implemented in a future update.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for sharing your ideas with us. We've noted them down and will discuss them as we plan future updates.

reviews.review_title: None of my vr videos work anymore
reviews.review_description: Just plain ol' ve videos, mp4 avi, h264, less than 2gb, from usb-c stick. Worked perfectly for months and now... either loading icon forever or just not playing. Too bad, paid premium. Was good while it lasted. Lmk when you push the next update, i'll see if it comes back

Hello, we recently noticed the Meta OS v2.4 update can break USB playback.

To help us figure out whether your issue is caused by Meta update or our app, could you roll back to SKYBOX v1.1.9 and test if USB videos play normally?

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select “v1.1.9 Release” and install the update. Please let us know if v1.1.9 works well for you.

In addition, we just created our Discord server. You can join and directly chat with our devs. Here is the Discord link: https://discord.gg/TqwWDmCvrk

reviews.review_description: i no longer really have a reason to use the app because they removed said functionality

developer_response.body:
Hello, 

Due to YouTube API restrictions, we are no longer able to  maintain native API integration. So we remove all YouTube-related features in the Live version. We truly apologize for the inconvenience this may cause. 

As a temporary workaround, you can switch to the beta version, which allows access to YouTube via in-app browser. Please be aware that this method may have some limitations, for example, 3D or VR video playback are  no longer supported.

To switch to beta channel:
On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the update.

Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you need any help.

reviews.review_description:
I have five VR video players on my Meta Quest 3 and I’ve tested a few others, but SKYBOX VR is the only one that genuinely does everything I need. I particularly appreciate the Lock Screen option when viewing my personal local files. It keeps the video fixed in front of my eyes even when I move my head, which is incredibly helpful during my Tai Chi training sessions. I can always see the trainer while still seeing my hands (thanks to hand tracking) and the room around me (via passthrough). It makes a real difference.
Beyond that, the whole interface is a pleasure to use: clean, intuitive, and full of genuinely useful settings and adjustments. Whether I’m tweaking the viewing angle/height, playback controls, picture settings, or anything else, everything is easy to reach and works exactly as expected.
None of the other players I’ve tried comes close to this level of polish or practicality. SKYBOX VR works beautifully for me.
A big thank-you and congratulations to the developers. You’ve built something outstanding here, and I hope you carry on adding new features and refinements over time. Highly recommended.

As a mather of fact i use the standalone You tube app again and can watch VR videos without problems. Skybox was the best for watching you tube but until this is fixed and more what has to be fixed  i not recommend buying this app. It is a waste of money atm.

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Due to YouTube API restrictions, we are no longer able to maintain native API integration. So we decided to remove all YouTube-related features in SKYBOX v1.1.9.

This is not an easy decision for us, and we truly apologize for the inconvenience this may cause.

As a temporary workaround, you can switch to the beta version, which allows access to YouTube via an in-app browser. 

To switch to beta channel:
On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the update.

If AirScreen doesn't work, please go to our website(https://skybox.xyz/get) to download the new AirScreen Client 2.0.0-620 and try again.

Feel free to reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you need any help.

reviews.review_description:
The store page clearly states:

"You can also stream one video to multiple devices simultaneously."

When no, you can not - neither do they intend to implement this feature!  

If you have two headsets with the same Meta account: You CAN NOT!
If you have two headsets same Meta account, different profiles: You CAN NOT. 

You are not even able to purchase a second copy in those cases - as if that would be a sane solution anyway.

In the metaphor of a home theatre (which is what this software is) you literally are requiring any and all friends (even in the same room), on the same network to pay money just to sit on the couch next to you.

This will discourage family use and ultimately promote piracy among those seeking solutions for expected and advertised behavior of the Skybox app.

On top of all this the current state of the software (January, 2026) is in a dismal state. Many bugs and missing features - even actual crashes requiring a restart of the headset. It is NOT currently stable under very many use-cases.  Simple load and play is possible without problems but there are MANY free applications available for that.

Customer support is also not great! If you have a problem or need information, expect to wait 3 days at a minimum - if your question gets answered at all.  It's worse on their website if you can imagine that.  Often real concerns and questions that require instructive replies are just marked on the site as "Hidden" and forever ignored. 

For these reasons I can NOT in good conscious recommend this App! 

Sorry Lucy, that's a one-star from me.

developer_response.body: Hello, Meta doesn't allow users to log into the same account on multiple devices to use the same app simultaneously. This is a platform-level restriction, not something that can be changed by us. During normal workdays, we try to review and respond to user feedback daily. During holidays or when additional time is need to test or diagnose an issue, responses may be delayed or not timely. Thank you for your understanding.

reviews.review_title: How do i read files from my phone

Loved this app on the old Gear VR as could watch files stored on my phone in the cinema. I can't seem to do it here though. I've connected via bluetooth but just cannot access any files. Any suggestions would be most appreciated!?

Update: And now the YouTube option has gone too! Worked a few days ago. All my favourites list on this app now won't play. That's another star off my rating!

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Due to YouTube API restrictions, we are no longer able to maintain native API integration. So we decided to remove all YouTube-related features in SKYBOX v1.1.9.

This is not an easy decision for us, and we truly apologize for the inconvenience this may cause.

As a temporary workaround, you can switch to the beta version, which allows access to YouTube via an in-app browser. 

To switch to beta channel:
On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the update.

In addition, you can install a DLNA server on your smartphone and access the files stored on your phone via DLNA protocol. 

Feel free to reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you need any help.

reviews.review_description: It plays perfectly for what I wanted. I use Emby and Plex hosted locally and so far, no issues with playback. I wish sorting worked better and it integrsted a bit better so browsing for what to watch was a bit easier but it is what it is and I'm still happy.

I bought this app with the hopes I could use the passthrough feature, however it simply does not work. I have tried all the tips to get it to work, but with no success. Apparently, many other uses have also failed to the passthrough to work. I spend funds and now feel like I got scammed. Please can you fix the passthrough feature ASAP.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we added support for passthrough videos in the beta version. Please follow the steps to update to beta v2.0.1.

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the update.

You can open a passthrough video, click "Advanced Settings" and enable the "Passthrough Video" toggle. Then SKYBOX will remove the background from a scene using Chroma Key Passthrough or Alpha Channel Passthrough.

Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have any problems.

reviews.review_description:
This player works great for playing 3D videos from NAS server. The interface is intuitive and very easy to use.
Thanks!

My first app on Quest and it's almost perfect for me. My one request to make it the ultimate- as a musicals / theatre fan, I would LOVE the option to have a plush, opulent grand theatre style (think Broadway / West End theatre). I love the Cinema style, but this would really put it over the top for musical theatre fans, honestly.

Absolutely perfect. It works perfectly. The synchronization with my NAS was immediate. Even the Airlink function works like a charm with my Mac! Then it lets you configure a lot of settings to enjoy your movies as you want. It was my first paid app and it worth all the money, even more!

I encode all my own movies... no matter which codec was used, which wrapper was used, or what resolution the video was encoded at, I get an error saying the video cannot be played (and they work with every other video player on my Quest). Waste of time and money, requested refund, will purchase a competitor.

developer_response.body:
Hello, are you trying to play the videos via SMB or AirScreen? 

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, please go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the beta update and see if it works as expected. 

Reach out contact@skybox.xyz if you need further help.

reviews.review_description: This app was my go to #1 app for watching YouTube, one of the first apps I've ever paid for because it was so good. However, the last couple of months, it has been completely useless and seeing the same complaints by other users is very dissappointing. Please fix this.

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Sorry for the inconvenience caused.

We released a new beta version, which supported accessing YouTube via web browser. If you can’t play YouTube videos, please switch to beta channel and try it out.

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the update.

Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have any problems.

reviews.review_description: When I launch airscreen desktop and connect to my pc, audio is working and able to control pc but the video is showing spinning wheel. Checked firewall settings on my PC and Skybox app has no restriction. Please reply if you know how to solve it or please refund my money. Thank you!

developer_response.body:
Hello, please go to our website(https://skybox.xyz/get), click the Windows Client to download the new AirScreen 2.0.0-620 and see if it works. 

If you still encounter the unplayable issue, please kindly share the "Info" level log with us so we can further investigate. 

1. Click SKYBOX's "Global Settings", change the "Logging Levels" to "Info".
2. Reproduce the issue you mentioned.
3. Click the "BUG" icon in the upper-right corner of "Global Settings".
4. Tick the "upload logs" box, and submit the in-app feedback. Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
The app functionality is great, I bought it mostly for SMB playback, the environments are really nice, but controlling it with hands only is horrendous. It either doesn't register the clicks at all, or it clicks randomly, moves the view all over the place, then it never disengages (like you are still holding it) no matter how much you put your fingers together. Based on the other reviews I hope at least it works better with controllers but if for some reason you can't use controllers, don't buy this app, it is really unusable

EDIT: just found out it doesn't even support passthrough videos in November 2025, hand navigation is still bad, I really don't understand what the good reviews are for

developer_response.body:
Hello, may I ask which version of SKYBOX and Meta Quest OS you are using? 

You can open SKYBOX's "Global Settings" and turn on "Show Stats" to check the version number.

reviews.review_description: This is really good , I just bought it and watching 3d movie in it , its really really good , thanks Skybox for making this 👍

reviews.review_title: YouTube vr mode isn't working please fix
reviews.review_description: Please fix YouTube vr as soon as possible even with 2.0.1 update beta version the youtube web browser app is laggy and buggy can't watch a thing on it please bring back to how it was and leave it untouched thank you the whole reason i bought this app was cuz of that and now it has become a waste

developer_response.body:
Hello,

We released a new beta version, which supported accessing YouTube via web browser. If you can’t play YouTube videos, please switch to beta channel and try it out.

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the update.

Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have any problems.

reviews.review_description: Hhhh very good

This app is amazing. The video playback capability is excellent. However, I would really love to have a feature that allows streaming video via URL. Sometimes I watch streams through URLs, but they can't be played on Skybox. I hope the Skybox development team will add this feature soon.
Love the environments
Nice app

This is my go-to media viewer when I wanna just enjoy something in full VR. Great environments, great settings. Feels how it should. Watching movies in a VR theatre is the dream.
However, if I may, a couple suggestions for the suggestion box;
- I would kill for a legally distinct theatre environment made for showcasing 1.43:1 content on a large format. Like one of those enormous theatres where the screen reaches from the floor to the ceiling. For any 4:3 content, that would be unreal viewing!
- Also, an option to lock audio channels to physical speaker locations in the virtual environment (So the centre channel is coming from the centre of the screen, and the rear surround is coming from the back of the theatre, etc), rather than the full surround setup just rotating with my head like I’m wearing headphones. The quest can do great immersive audio, and I wish this app took full advantage of that.

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for your suggestions!

SKYBOX v2.0.0(beta) added support for spatial audio. You can follow the steps below to switch to beta 2.0.0 and have a try. 

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the update.

What's more, you can click "Cinema Scene" on the playback panel, switch to "ULTRA Cinema" and play 1.43:1 content.

Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have any problems.

reviews.review_description: Opens vid files, connects to pc, it does the job.
The product is very bad. Doesn't even have a browser to play some videos online. You can only play local files

reviews.review_title: VR videos blurry compared to play'a
reviews.review_description: Wasted my money on this as the quality is blurry compared to play’a app. Skybox has thumbnails for network files which is nice but if I’m not going to use it what’s the point! Not recommended.
The app is easy to use and offers many possibilities. I had a question and got my answer within minutes. Great customer service. Thanks.
No refund.
Youtube keeps saying unable to play... Its been a known issue for atleast 6 months... When is the fix coming?

developer_response.body:
Hello,

We released a new beta version, which supported accessing YouTube via web browser. If you can't play YouTube videos, please switch to beta channel and try it out.

On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the update.

Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have any problems.

reviews.review_title: The app I didn't know I needed all along
reviews.review_description: Was trying 4xvr until it asked me to pay £23 so gave usb playing on the quest a goog. Sky box was most recommended so I paid a 3rd of the price for Skybox, I wasn't disappointed. The quality of my 1080p & 4k files is much clearer than streaming & I was sat there thinking cinema quality. Highly recommended.
It stream 8k over smb via wifi!

reviews.review_title: Best VR MEDIA PLAYER there is
reviews.review_description:
Whoa, Skybox sure blew me away with both the presentation and the overall amount of formats it reads. Brings the cinema view from 4XVR and DeoVR's ability to view pictures, along with its own app to airplay media.
Viewed my pictures without hiccups, not to mention the largest support for Jellyfin features in all players I've used.
My only issue with it is that it fixes pictures for 10 seconds, instead of a custom time or being able to switch when we want.
Keep it up, guys.

reviews.review_title: Needs more than one favorites list
reviews.review_description: It would be nice to have multiple list. My favorite list gets so full it becomes pointless.

reviews.review_title: Best media player i have found
reviews.review_description: But i'm always looking up and my range of projection movement is always a bit short on the height, and the fisheye on never converts correctly. I'm sure they will get it figured out. Otherwise no complaints. Good job developers.

Most people don't know/recognize this but not all VR-Media players do a great job at rendering 3D videos/movies even though they support them, but this app is OUT-STANDING in this regard and being a big fan of 3D movies and movies in general, this app blew me out of the water.

I greatly commend them for maintaining the natural default color scheme/ambience/shade(not sure what to call it) that comes with the Quest 3 which helps to enusre that the movies maintain their natural color, look and feel--unlike the horrible path "MoonVR" took in this matter (I HATE IT).

I also think it is the best Sounding Quest 3 Media player, and I love that it supports a wide range of audio codecs.

IT IS SIMPLY THE BEST!, I LOVE IT❤️😁

reviews.review_title: quest 3 8k and go back on image
reviews.review_description: On quest 3, 8k vr hvc1 7680x3840 not playable (2 frame /sec) (and not it's not my wifi, other players can do it with 0 lag). When browsing images (from pc), i can only move forward, not backward. BUT image display size stay the same, wich is perfect! the folder navigation is also nice. I also hate that when laying down, the browsing windows cannot be visible at eye level.

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for your feedback. 

We tested videos with the same parameters, but didn't reproduce the unplayable issue. To further investigate, could you please share a sample video for testing? 

What's more, you can switch between images by holding the Grip button(not the Trigger button) and moving the thumbstick. 

If you want to watch videos while lying down, please go to Quest "Settings" > "Experimental", and then enable "Use Apps While Lying Down". 

Hope it helps. Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have other concerns.

reviews.review_description:
Used Network storage to view 3D movies and is working happy with the purchase.

Thanks app team for a good product.
YouTube not working

reviews.review_description: This isn't an internet issue cause I'm running it off local memory, however for some reason it buffers 0.3 MB/s. For some reason if you skip forward, the buffering becomes endless and happens every 1 second or so. Honestly quite embarrassing.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
 
Sorry for the inconvenience caused. 

Could you please share with us the "Info" level logs? We'd like to check the logs to further investigate the issue. 

1. Click SKYBOX's "Global Settings", change the "Logging Levels" to "Info".
2. Reproduce the issue you mentioned.
3. Click the "BUG" icon in the upper-right corner of "Global Settings".
4. Tick the "upload logs" box, and submit the in-app feedback. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I like everything about this except for one major shortcoming. I am hard of hearing and all of my personal media collection have subtitles in SRT files, which it doesn't recognize. I use Emby on my real-world devices and it has no problem with them. And yes, the filenames are the same except for the extension. This app is therefore useless to me for my personal collection. I can still use it for other streaming sources, but this will likely cause me to ask for my money back.

developer_response.body:
Hello, if you access your Emby server via DLNA protocol, you will not see the external subtitles because DLNA itself doesn't support external subtitles. 

You can update to SKYBOX 2.0.0(beta),  go to the "Network" channel, click the "Add Server" icon in the top-right corner, select "Add Emby" to directly access your Emby media server. In this way, you should be able to see the srt subtitles. 

Here are the steps to update to beta 2.0.0:
On your Quest 2 or Quest 3, go to Quest Settings > Privacy & safety > Installed app > find SKYBOX VR Video Player > click Release Channels > select "2.0.0 Preview" and install the update.

Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have any problems.

reviews.review_title: Who needs a big screen tv
reviews.review_description: Skybox is like having a portable big screen tv wherever you go. Indispensable app for the Meta Quest.

Absolutely I like this. But... just one thing I wanna tell dev team that make buttons for 10 sec or 15 sec rewind, forward video. Even 'Virtual desktop' is not a vr player, its player has these button and it's very useful for me. Please add buttons for rewinding, fowarding

developer_response.body: Hello, you can go to SKYBOX's "Global Settings" > select the "Playback" tab > adjust the "Fast Forward/Backward" time. Then when you move the thumbsitck left or right, the video progress will skip backward or forward by the number of seconds you set. Hope it helps! Reach out to contact@skybox.xyz if you have other problems.
